> There is a limited-edition attack character with so many poison points: slow start, very hard-hitting, very much in need of an axis, afraid of button madness, extremely afraid of seals, afraid of barriers, afraid of locks, single damage limit, la

content: I had to use a translator to understand this comment but I would like to say that all of the point made are valid and Vortice demands too just to under-perform in the end,a buff or positive change towards her would be appreciated

content: 這就是後誕墨時代的深海傷害型限定了嗎? 那很傷害了
